message:
🌱 Add alertmanager: Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts mission (#1726)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-1598-add-option-to-customize-alias-field-for-opsgenie-alerts",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts",
+    "description": "Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current alertmanager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nhelm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working alertmanager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager\n```\nOpsGenie deduplicate messages based on the Alert [alias](https://docs.opsgenie.com/docs/alert-api#section-create-alert)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts",
+        "description": "Using `external_labels` is the right thing to do here.\n```yaml\nalert: KubeCPUOvercommit\nexpr: sum(kube_resourcequota{job=\"kube-state-metrics\",resource=\"requests.cpu\",type=\"hard\"})\n  / sum(node:node_num_cpu:sum) > 1.5\nfor: 5m\nlabels:\n  severity: warning\nannotations:\n  message: Overcommited CPU resource request quota on Namespaces.\n  runbook_url: https://github.com/kubernetes-monitoring/kubernetes-mixin/tree/master/runbook.md#alert-name-kubecpuovercommit\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Using `external_labels` is the right thing to do here.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "alert: KubeCPUOvercommit\nexpr: sum(kube_resourcequota{job=\"kube-state-metrics\",resource=\"requests.cpu\",type=\"hard\"})\n  / sum(node:node_num_cpu:sum) > 1.5\nfor: 5m\nlabels:\n  severity: warning\nannotations:\n  message: Overcommited CPU resource request quota on Namespaces.\n  runbook_url: https://github.com/kubernetes-monitoring/kubernetes-mixin/tree/master/runbook.md#alert-name-kubecpuovercommit",
+        "route:\n  group_by: ['service', 'severity', 'alertname']\n  group_wait: 30s\n  group_interval: 2m\n  repeat_interval: 5m\n  receiver: opsgenie",
+        "externalLabels:\n    cluster: ${CLUSTER_NAME}\n    env: ${CLUSTER_ENV}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "alertmanager",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "alertmanager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/1598",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-24T06:30:39.071Z",

+  }
+}
